hero_subtitle: Building the digital future I believe in, one piece of code at a time.
hero_description: I build robust and scalable web applications.
about_section_body: I'm a passionate developer with experience in building web applications using modern technologies.
aboutme_bio: I am a {edad}-year-old Full Stack Developer from Córdoba, Argentina, passionate about creating innovative web solutions. With experience in modern technologies like Angular, React, Java, and .NET, I enjoy building applications that make a difference. When I am not coding, I love exploring Argentina's beautiful landscapes and traveling to discover new places.
whatido_1: ⚡   Building responsive websites front end using Angular, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.
whatido_2: 💻   Developing backend APIs using Java, Spring Boot, and MongoDB.
whatido_3: 🔧   Maintaining and updating existing applications using AngularJs, Java, and .NET Core.
exp_prosocial_1: Led the maintenance and updates of multiple applications using Angular, Java, and MongoDB.
exp_prosocial_2: Implemented system integrations with AWS, Auth0, Salesforce, Stripe, and Zoom.
exp_beereal_1: Developed a high-performance landing page using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Strapi.
exp_beereal_2: Emphasized accessibility, user experience, and optimization for mobile devices.
exp_osprera_1: Maintained and updated internal web applications for a health insurance provider using Angular and .NET Core.
exp_osprera_2: Conducted testing with MS Test, ensuring high-quality releases.
exp_hipodromo_1: Collaborated with the IT team to develop various web applications and REST APIs.
exp_hipodromo_2: Utilized Angular with Material Design and .NET Core for backend services.
